title: Chaotic Friends
theme: One harmless hang turns into group liability.

nodes.prompt: Your group finds an unattended karaoke machine outside a convenience store.
nodes.resultText: The room picks the exact level of public embarrassment it deserves.

choices.label: Steal the mic
choices.resultText: The room lunges for instant karaoke authority and turns a sidewalk into a stage.

choices.label: Sell tickets
choices.resultText: Somebody appoints themselves finance and starts charging strangers for the chaos.

choices.label: Pretend it's art
choices.resultText: Confidence wins. The group rebrands trespassing as an immersive installation.

nodes.prompt: Three strangers demand to hear your best breakup anthem right now.
nodes.resultText: The room escalates from cringe to commitment instantly.

choices.label: Scream-sing
choices.resultText: The breakup anthem becomes a public emergency and somehow boosts ticket sales.

choices.label: Lip-sync badly
choices.resultText: The room commits to fraud with choreography and loses the crowd immediately.

nodes.prompt: Someone actually pays and asks if this is a legal event.
nodes.resultText: The room chooses whether to lie with confidence or panic with flair.

choices.label: Say yes confidently
choices.resultText: Your fake festival now has lore, authority, and exactly zero permits.

choices.label: Run the merch table
choices.resultText: The room pivots into merch before having a song, a plan, or legal standing.

nodes.prompt: A local influencer starts filming your performance installation.
nodes.resultText: The room picks the flavor of viral regret.

choices.label: Lean into chaos
choices.resultText: The influencer clip turns your mess into a movement before anyone can stop it.

choices.label: Demand sponsorship
choices.resultText: The group tries monetizing the bit too early and gets laughed out of the frame.

nodes.prompt: By midnight, half the city thinks you launched a guerrilla music festival.
A mall security guard crowns you the worst organized act of the year.
